params.name: Seal of the Ancients
params.description:
On Jan 1, 1932 AD, the Seal of the Old God was discovered.
The Seal of the Old God is an ancient deity's symbol that requires a specific activation ritual and a suitable vessel for stabilization. This seal instills disgust and fear in evil creatures, making it a highly prized talisman for many.
params.ss7:
All Sanctum Glorium Output +2%
All Sanctum Glorium Output +2% (Awakened)
